backend.changelog: Pre-Generate close-foreign-docs prompt now runs BEFORE attempting to open the BOM root assembly. Workstation Apply Update for CadBridge 1.8.53 strongly recommended -- BOM root no longer gets closed and reopened in the 3DPDF post-loop on Part-as-root or single-candidate Assembly-as-root BOMs.

cadBridge.changelog: Generate now opens the BOM root into a clean SolidWorks session. This eliminates the 'Unable to load revision A.1 of X -- X will use revision B.1 because it is already open in the session' dialog seen on large assemblies, and prevents a stale revision being used for a generated output. Unsaved documents are never closed. Recommended for anyone generating large assemblies.
